Trump: “The Deal with Iran is now complete… Strait of Hormuz OPEN TO ALL, US naval blockade lifted immediately.” Official signing Friday in Switzerland.

Market reaction was instant: Brent dropped to $84.88 (-3.2% on the day, -6% this week).

But the price is running months ahead of operational reality. 🧵
